name: Buckhead Credit Repair Company
description_short: Buckhead Credit Repair Company is a credit repair provider based in Atlanta, Georgia. Rated 4.4/5 with 26 Google reviews, reflecting strong customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Buckhead Credit Repair Company is a credit repair provider serving clients in Atlanta, Georgia. Carrying a 4.4/5.0 Google rating from 26 reviews, Buckhead Credit Repair Company has an strong reputation among consumers in the Atlanta area looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

Buckhead Credit Repair Company specializes in credit repair services designed to help consumers repair and improve their credit scores. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Atlanta, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Buckhead Credit Repair Company operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Atlanta, Georgia area who are considering Buckhead Credit Repair Company should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
